comment: Exact label match and same role in ontology (Administrator). (subject_label=Administrator; object_label=Administrator)
Exact label match and similar class restrictions (Author).
Exact label match; both are subclassed as contributions/documents in their ontologies.
Exact label match and similar modeling as a conference entity.
Exact label match and similar domain/range modeling for person-related properties.
Exact label match for property and same inverse/usage semantics (writtenBy/writes). (subject_type=owl:ObjectProperty; object_type=owl:ObjectProperty)
hasAuthor (author of a paper) aligns structurally with writtenBy (inverse of writes) in confOf; labels differ but semantics align. (subject_type=owl:ObjectProperty; object_type=owl:ObjectProperty)
writePaper (inverse of hasAuthor) corresponds to writes (author writes contribution) — lexical variant and structural correspondence. (subject_type=owl:ObjectProperty; object_type=owl:ObjectProperty)

title (datatype property on Paper) corresponds to hasTitle (datatype property on Contribution). Labels are lexical variants; domains align. (subject_type=owl:DatatypeProperty; object_type=owl:DatatypeProperty)
email vs hasEmail: lexical variant and same domain (Person). (subject_type=owl:DatatypeProperty; object_type=owl:DatatypeProperty)
ProgramCommitteeMember (cmt) corresponds to Member_PC (confOf) — both model PC members with review responsibilities; lexical forms differ. (subject_type=owl:Class; object_type=owl:Class)
Chairman (cmt) aligns with Chair_PC (confOf) as chair/PC-chair role; labels differ but semantics align. (subject_type=owl:Class; object_type=owl:Class)
Review (a document in cmt) is related to Reviewing_event (confOf) which models the reviewing procedure; related but not strictly equivalent.
Meta-Review (cmt) corresponds to reviewing-results concepts in confOf (summary/results of review) — related but not equivalent.
